system.description:
There are only two states of being: sleeping, and awake. Touch an inanimate object, say “wakey-wakey,” and roll [quality].

If Wake-Up Call is used on an unconscious but already living target, they awaken from any kind of illusory or magical sleep fully refreshed.
system.synopsis: Wake an object or person up

outcomes.success:
the object awakens. Awakened objects can speak, move (using an unusual flexibility in their original shape or with a gentle floating), perceive the world around them, plan, and feel. Their personality is informed by their history: whether they were formed accidentally, or created with purpose; whether they were a tool of creation or destruction; whether or not they were once a living thing.

Unless you and your teammates have given it reason to feel otherwise, the awakened object treats you with courtesy and respect. This effect ends after 1 hour, or when you dismiss it by saying “night-night” to the target.
outcomes.eachplus3: you may extend this effect by 1 hour or wake an additional object.
outcomes.failure: you and the object swap consciousnesses. You are trapped as an Awoken Object, and the object now controls your body, Anomaly Abilities and all.
